text.title: git-server-workflow Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for git-server-workflow as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running `git pull` inside the post-receive hook without `--ff-only`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A non-fast-forward pull triggers an interactive merge or rebase prompt, which hangs the hook indefinitely because there is no TTY. Use `git fetch` + `git reset --hard origin/main` instead.
